originalTitle: APA (APA) Gains As Market Dips: What You Should Know
summary: APA (APA) reached $35.22 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a +2.74% change compared to its last close.
content:
APA (APA) ended the recent trading session at $35.22, demonstrating a +2.74% change from the preceding day's closing price. The stock exceeded the S&P 500, which registered a loss of 1.01% for the day. Elsewhere, the Dow lost 0.77%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq lost 1.4%.

The oil and natural gas producer's stock has climbed by 3.78% in the past month, exceeding the Oils-Energy sector's gain of 1.22% and the S&P 500's gain of 0.32%.

The investment community will be closely monitoring the performance of APA in its forthcoming earnings report. The company is scheduled to release its earnings on August 5, 2026. The company's upcoming EPS is projected at $1.88, signifying a 116.09% increase compared to the same quarter of the previous year. In the meantime, our current consensus estimate forecasts the revenue to be $2.43 billion, indicating a 7.01% decline compared to the corresponding quarter of the prior year.

Looking at the full year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates suggest analysts are expecting earnings of $4.98 per share and revenue of $8.8 billion. These totals would mark changes of +32.1% and -4.54%, respectively, from last year.

Investors might also notice recent changes to analyst estimates for APA. Such recent modifications usually signify the changing landscape of near-term business trends. As a result, upbeat changes in estimates indicate analysts' favorable outlook on the business health and profitability.

Research indicates that these estimate revisions are directly correlated with near-term share price momentum. To take advantage of this, we've established the Zacks Rank, an exclusive model that considers these estimated changes and delivers an operational rating system.

The Zacks Rank system ranges from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell). It has a remarkable, outside-audited track record of success, with #1 stocks delivering an average annual return of +25% since 1988. The Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has moved 10.83% lower within the past month. APA is holding a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell) right now.

Investors should also note APA's current valuation metrics, including its Forward P/E ratio of 6.88. Its industry sports an average Forward P/E of 9.98, so one might conclude that APA is trading at a discount comparatively.

The Oil and Gas - Exploration and Production - United States industry is part of the Oils-Energy sector. This industry currently has a Zacks Industry Rank of 210, which puts it in the bottom 15% of all 250+ industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank gauges the strength of our individual industry groups by measuring the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks within the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

You can find more information on all of these metrics, and much more, on Zacks.com.

chineseTitle: APA (APA) 随着市场下跌而上涨：您应该知道什么
chineseSummary: APA（APA）在最近一个交易日收盘时达到35.22美元，较上一交易日收盘价上涨+2.74%。
chineseContent:
APA (APA) 最近交易日收于 35.22 美元，较前一交易日收盘价上涨 2.74%。该股超过标准普尔 500 指数，后者当日下跌 1.01%。其他方面，道指下跌 0.77%，而以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数下跌 1.4%。

过去一个月，这家石油和天然气生产商的股价上涨了 3.78%，超过石油能源板块 1.22% 的涨幅和标准普尔 500 指数 0.32% 的涨幅。

投资界将密切关注 APA 即将发布的收益报告的表现。该公司定于2026年8月5日发布财报。该公司即将公布的每股收益预计为1.88美元，较上年同期增长116.09%。与此同时，我们目前的共识预测收入为 24.3 亿美元，比去年同期下降 7.01%。

纵观全年，Zacks 一致估计表明分析师预计每股收益为 4.98 美元，收入为 88 亿美元。这些总数与去年相比分别变化了+32.1%和-4.54%。

投资者可能还会注意到分析师对 APA 估计的最近变化。最近的此类修改通常意味着近期业务趋势的变化。因此，预期的乐观变化表明分析师对业务健康和盈利能力的乐观前景。

研究表明，这些估计修正与近期股价动能直接相关。为了利用这一点，我们建立了 Zacks Rank，这是一个独特的模型，考虑了这些估计的变化并提供了一个可操作的评级系统。

Zacks 排名系统范围从#1（强力买入）到#5（强力卖出）。它拥有令人瞩目的、经过外部审计的成功记录，自 1988 年以来排名第一的股票平均年回报率为 +25%。 Zacks 共识 EPS 预期在过去一个月内下降了 10.83%。 APA 目前的 Zacks 排名为#4（销售）。

投资者还应注意 APA 目前的估值指标，包括其 6.88 的远期市盈率。该行业的平均远期市盈率为 9.98，因此人们可能会得出结论，APA 的交易价格相对较低。

石油和天然气 - 勘探和生产 - 美国工业是石油能源行业的一部分。该行业目前的 Zacks 行业排名为 210，在所有 250 多个行业中排名垫底 15%。

Zacks 行业排名通过衡量各个行业组中个股的平均 Zacks 排名来衡量各个行业组的实力。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

您可以在 Zacks.com 上找到有关所有这些指标的更多信息以及更多信息。
